#Now we evaluate compliance subsets using structural information filters.
#(Note: Evaluated directly from the factored dataset to preserve downstream grouping attributes)
# Custom plotting helpers explicitly targeting compliance structural features
mutate(y_shift = runif(1, -y_jitter, y_jitter), x_jittered = x_numeric + x_shift, y_jittered = .data[[dv_col]] + y_shift) %>%
ggplot(df_jittered, aes(x = x_jittered, y = y_jittered, fill = type, color = type)) +
geom_line(aes(group = subj_code), alpha = 0.15, color = "grey50", position = position_jitter(width = x_jitter, height = y_jitter)) +
geom_point(alpha = 0.12, size = 1, color = "black", position = position_jitter(width = x_jitter, height = y_jitter)) +
theme(legend.position = "bottom", strip.background = element_blank(), strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12), strip.text.y = element_blank())
ggsave("Figures/Participants_Sub.svg", plot = p_participants_sub, width = 8, height = 6, device = "svg")
